zh.lifeSummary: 當James Stoddard Sr.於大約1534年出生在英國斯塔福爾利可時，他的父親William Stoddard32歲，母親Frances Marion Stanley28歲。他於1555年與Jannett Henderson在英國米德萊可倫敦結婚。他們至少是2個兒子的父母。他去世於大約1590年在他的家鄉享年58歲。

nameMeanings.name: Stoddard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Scottish: occupational name for someone who looked after a stud of horses, from Middle English and Older Scots stod(e), stud(e) ‘establishment where horses were bred’, ‘herd of stallions or mares’ + herd(e) ‘herdsman’.

English: variant of Stothard, an occupational name for a keeper of cattle or horses, from Middle English stot ‘steer, bullock’ or ‘horse’ + herd(e) ‘herdsman’. The name was probably confused with Stodeherd ‘keeper of stud-horses’ (see above).

History: The Stoddard family of Boston, MA, was introduced by Anthony Stoddard (1600–1686), who settled there in 1639. Solomon Stoddard (1643–1728/9) was a prominent Congregational clergyman in MA, the grandfather of Jonathan Edwards, and progenitor of many noted descendants.

variants.name: Stodden
meanings: perhaps occasionally a habitational name from Studding's Farm in Herstmonceux (Sussex), probably named with Old English stōd ‘stud, herd of horses’ + denn ‘pasture’. Compare Stoddard .

variants.name: Stoddart
meanings: English (Durham and Cumberland) and Scottish (Midlothian and Lanarkshire): variant of   Stoddard  .

nameMeanings.name: James
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of the name borne in the New Testament by two of Christ's disciples, James son of Zebedee and James son of Alphaeus. This form comes from Late Latin Iacomus, a variant of Iacobus, Latin form of Greek Iakobos. This is the same name as Old Testament Jacob (Hebrew Yaakov), but for many centuries now they have been thought of in the English-speaking world as two distinct names. In Britain, James is a royal name that from the beginning of the 15th century onwards was associated particularly with the Scottish house of Stewart: James I of Scotland ( 1394–1437 ; ruled 1424–37 ) was a patron of the arts and a noted poet, as well as an energetic ruler. King James VI of Scotland ( 1566–1625 ; reigned 1567–1625 ) succeeded to the throne of England in 1603 . His grandson, James II of England ( 1633–1701 ; reigned 1685–8 ) was a Roman Catholic, deposed in 1688 in favour of his Protestant daughter Mary and her husband William of Orange. From then on he, his son (also called James), and his grandson Charles (‘Bonnie Prince Charlie’) made various unsuccessful attempts to recover the English throne. Their supporters were known as Jacobites (from Latin Iacobus), and the name James became for a while particularly associated with Roman Catholicism on the one hand, and Highland opposition to the English government on the other. Nevertheless, it has since become one of the most perennially popular boys' names.

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The Royal Exchange is Organized
historicEvents.description: The Royal Exchange was organized in January 1571 by Sir Thomas Gresham. Gresham is known as the father of English banking.

historicEvents.title: The First English Colony is Established in America
historicEvents.description: England established its first colony in North America in 1585 as a way to generate additional wealth. The colony was named Virginia, after the virgin Queen Elizabeth I.

historicEvents.title: Elizabeth I Signs Death Warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots
historicEvents.description: Elizabeth I signed the death warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots, on February 1, 1587, as she was found guilty of plotting to assasinate Elizabeth. Mary, Queen of Scots, was beheaded at Fotheringhay Castle in England on February 8, 1587.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Elizabeth I.org - Mary Queen of Scots

en.lifeSummary: When James Stoddard Sr. was born about 1534, in Leek, Staffordshire, England, his father, William Stoddard, was 32 and his mother, Frances Marion Stanley, was 28. He married Jannett Henderson in 1555, in London, Middlesex, England. They were the parents of at least 2 sons. He died about 1590, in his hometown, at the age of 58.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque James Stoddard Sr. est né environ 1534, à Leek, Staffordshire, Angleterre, son père, William Stoddard, avait 32 ans et sa mère, Frances Marion Stanley, avait 28 ans. Il a épousé Jannett Henderson en 1555, à Londres, Middlesex, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils. Il est décédé environ 1590, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 58 ans.

it.lifeSummary: Quando James Stoddard Sr. è nato il circa 1534 nel Leek, Staffordshire, England, il suo padre, William Stoddard, aveva 32 anni e il suo madre, Frances Marion Stanley, aveva 28 anni. Lui sposato Jannett Henderson nel 1555, nel London, Middlesex, England. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli. Morì circa 1590, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 58 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: James Stoddard Sr.が約1534年にイギリススタフォードシュアイアリークで生まれた時，父William Stoddardは32歳，母Frances Marion Stanleyは28歳であった。1555年にイギリスミッドレセックスロンドンでJannett Hendersonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子の親であった。彼は約1590年に故郷で58歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: James Stoddard Sr.(이)가 대략 1534년 영국 스태퍼드실르 리크에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 William Stoddard(은)는 32세였고, 그의 어머니 Frances Marion Stanley(은)는 28세였다. 그는 1555년 영국 미들레세스 런던에서 Jannett Henderson(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 대략 1590년 그의 고향에서 58세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда James Stoddard Sr. родился около 1534 г. в местности лик, стаффордшир, Англия, его отцу по имени William Stoddard было 32 года, а матери, которую звали Frances Marion Stanley, 28. Он женился на женщине по имени Jannett Henderson в 1555 г. в местности Лондон, миддлесекс, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына. Он умер около 1590 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 58 лет.
